title: Advanced Emerald Mod
description: Advanced Emerald is a mod that allow you to make the full set of emerald included paxel, emerald is above iron and below diamond
body:
# ![Emerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c87d49f9855599e8afd7c895406f5e2c67d22e.png) Advanced Emerald ![Emerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c87d49f9855599e8afd7c895406f5e2c67d22e.png)

Advanced Emerald is a mod that allow you to make the full set of emerald included paxel, hammer and excavator. The emerald set is above iron and below diamond, its and intermediate step between those two

## ![Emerald Armor, Tools And Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa4308735a0cb1d82f6f7c286f000a996f18197.gif) Amethyst Armor, Tools And Weapons Stats:

### Changelog:
4.5.0 Adds the Emerald Armor Trims, improves the In-Game description and fix some objects values

4.0.0 Version improves the armor texture, adds two new achivements and fix the rest, and adds and in game description of the game

3.5.0 Version fix tools and armor errors and improve the textures of all tolls and armor

3.0.0 Version Changes the colors of all textures

2.5.0 version adds the hammer and excavator and change slightly most of textures 

2.0.0 Version adds the achievments to the mod

1.5.0 Version adds the Paxel
